image_prompt_master: photographic cinematic storyboard keyframe. single static frame for a voiced comic animatic. visual style: Cinematic Realism v1. mood: cinematic, moody, controlled lighting. palette: warm highlights, cool shadows. stable character identity across shots. consistent environment layout and prop continuity. clean frame, no captions, no watermark, no user interface.
image_prompt_scene: scene: Apartment Kitchen Night. must keep set elements: red fridge, wooden table, rainy window. lighting: dim warm lamp + blue moonlight. match scene anchors: A wide shot from door, table center, red fridge left, rainy window right; B table closeup with red mug and warm practical lamp; C rainy window with cool blue moonlight and hallway edge.
image_prompt_characters: character lock: Protagonist A (charA_v1), hair: short_black, outfit: white_hoodie + black_jeans, accessories: silver_ring_left_hand.
image_prompt_shot: shot S005. camera intent: comic_panel_03. action beats: 林澈走到门前，凑近猫眼; 通过猫眼看到空荡荡的走廊; 走廊灯一盏接一盏熄灭，陷入黑暗; 林澈后退，呼吸急促. narration intent: 旁白 explains "他走到猫眼前，走廊空着，灯却一盏一盏熄灭。". dialogue mood: 林澈 says "有人在外面。". Shot-to-shot continuity: maintain exact character identity, scene layout, lighting and prop positions from previous shot. Visual style must match preceding frame. shot positive notes: Close-up of young man's eye pressed against peephole, distorted view of empty hallway, lights going out one by one, darkening corridor, claustrophobic, horror atmosphere, high contrast, film noir style.
image_prompt_final: photographic cinematic storyboard keyframe. single static frame for a voiced comic animatic. visual style: Cinematic Realism v1. mood: cinematic, moody, controlled lighting. palette: warm highlights, cool shadows. stable character identity across shots. consistent environment layout and prop continuity. clean frame, no captions, no watermark, no user interface. scene: Apartment Kitchen Night. must keep set elements: red fridge, wooden table, rainy window. lighting: dim warm lamp + blue moonlight. match scene anchors: A wide shot from door, table center, red fridge left, rainy window right; B table closeup with red mug and warm practical lamp; C rainy window with cool blue moonlight and hallway edge. character lock: Protagonist A (charA_v1), hair: short_black, outfit: white_hoodie + black_jeans, accessories: silver_ring_left_hand. shot S005. camera intent: comic_panel_03. action beats: 林澈走到门前，凑近猫眼; 通过猫眼看到空荡荡的走廊; 走廊灯一盏接一盏熄灭，陷入黑暗; 林澈后退，呼吸急促. narration intent: 旁白 explains "他走到猫眼前，走廊空着，灯却一盏一盏熄灭。". dialogue mood: 林澈 says "有人在外面。". Shot-to-shot continuity: maintain exact character identity, scene layout, lighting and prop positions from previous shot. Visual style must match preceding frame. shot positive notes: Close-up of young man's eye pressed against peephole, distorted view of empty hallway, lights going out one by one, darkening corridor, claustrophobic, horror atmosphere, high contrast, film noir style.
negative_prompt: cartoon, neon cyberpunk (unless explicitly requested), sunlight, daylight, modern led lights, crowd, bright, daytime, anime, oversaturated, face drift, outfit change, prop drift, wrong set layout, extra fingers, text artifacts, subtitles burned into image, logo, watermark

reference_images.note: wide shot from door, table center, red fridge left, rainy window right
table closeup with red mug and warm practical lamp
rainy window with cool blue moonlight and hallway edge

voiceover.speaker: 旁白
voiceover.text: 他走到猫眼前，走廊空着，灯却一盏一盏熄灭。

manual_workflow.external_generation: paste image_prompt_final and negative_prompt into any web image/video tool; upload reference_images when supported
manual_workflow.context_hint: Use context_keyframes as visual reference to maintain shot-to-shot continuity with previous shot.
